focus.lock_on_client.general.desc: General lock-on behavior and HUD settings.
focus.lock_on_client.camera.desc: Camera behavior and shoulder transition settings.
focus.lock_on_client.targetFilters.desc: Configure which entities can be considered for lock-on.
focus.lock_on_client.general.autoSwitchT: Automatically switch to third-person back camera when lock-on is enabled.
focus.lock_on_client.general.allowFirstP: Allow entering and staying in first-person while lock-on is active.
focus.lock_on_client.general.allowFrontF: Allow Front-Facing Third Person While Targeting
Allow front-facing third-person camera while lock-on is active.
Enable first-person targeting to edit this setting.
focus.lock_on_client.general.showLockOnD: Show lock-on debug text in the HUD while a target is locked.
focus.lock_on_client.general.lockOnIndic: Select the lock-on indicator texture style.
focus.lock_on_client.camera.useCustomSwa: When disabled, swapping shoulders mirrors X/rotation from the edited shoulder.
focus.lock_on_client.camera.cameraMode.d: Static keeps the selected shoulder preset. Dynamic auto-adjusts shoulder and camera spacing during lock-on.
focus.lock_on_client.camera.cameraFloati: How strongly the lock-on camera follows its target position. Lower values feel more floaty.
focus.lock_on_client.camera.cameraDrag.d: Adds rotational drag to lock-on camera aiming. Higher values create more catch-up lag.
focus.lock_on_client.camera.cameraSwapSp: How quickly manual shoulder swaps transition when camera mode is Static.
focus.lock_on_client.camera.cameraSwapSm: Applies easing to manual shoulder swaps when camera mode is Static.
focus.lock_on_client.camera.dynamicCamer: How quickly dynamic mode transitions between shoulders.
Applies easing to dynamic shoulder transitions for softer swaps.
focus.lock_on_client.camera.openCameraPo: Open a live preview editor for lock-on third-person camera offsets and rotation.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwap.targetSw: Ignore tiny mouse motion below this amount while locked on.
Mouse movement required before directional target swap can trigger.
How closely candidate direction must match mouse direction.
Minimum on-screen spacing from current target to allow a swap.
How quickly stored mouse input fades when swap does not trigger.
How long post-swap aim smoothing stays active.
Yaw aim responsiveness during post-swap smoothing.
Pitch aim responsiveness during post-swap smoothing.
Maximum yaw rotation step per tick during post-swap smoothing.
Maximum pitch rotation step per tick during post-swap smoothing.
How quickly target-point smoothing adapts right after a swap.
How strongly player yaw/pitch follows lock-on aim at swap start. Lower values reduce snap.
focus.lock_on_client.targetFilters.enabl: Apply target filters to lock-on and directional target swap. Disabled by default.
focus.lock_on_client.targetFilters.targe: Exclude filters out matching targets. Exclusive only allows matching targets.
focus.lock_on_client.targetFilters.filte: Include players in target filtering rules.
Include passive mobs in target filtering rules.
Include neutral mobs in target filtering rules.
Include hostile mobs in target filtering rules.
focus.lock_on_client.targetFilters.targe: Entity IDs to match in target filtering (example: minecraft:zombie).
focus.lock_on_client.autoSwitchToThirdPe: Automatically switch to third-person back camera when lock-on is enabled.
focus.lock_on_client.allowFirstPersonWhi: Allow entering and staying in first-person while lock-on is active.
focus.lock_on_client.allowFrontFacingThi: Allow Front-Facing Third Person While Targeting
Allow front-facing third-person camera while lock-on is active.
Enable first-person targeting to edit this setting.
focus.lock_on_client.showLockOnDebugText: Show lock-on debug text in the HUD while a target is locked.
focus.lock_on_client.lockOnIndicatorStyl: Select the lock-on indicator texture style.
focus.lock_on_client.useCustomSwappedSho: When disabled, swapping shoulders mirrors X/rotation from the edited shoulder.
focus.lock_on_client.cameraMode.desc: Static keeps the selected shoulder preset. Dynamic auto-adjusts shoulder and camera spacing during lock-on.
Use the selected shoulder preset exactly.
focus.lock_on_client.camera_mode.DYNAMIC: Adapt shoulder and camera spacing from player/target positioning.
focus.lock_on_client.cameraFloatiness.de: How strongly the lock-on camera follows its target position. Lower values feel more floaty.
focus.lock_on_client.cameraDrag.desc: Adds rotational drag to lock-on camera aiming. Higher values create more catch-up lag.
focus.lock_on_client.cameraSwapSpeed.des: How quickly manual shoulder swaps transition when camera mode is Static.
focus.lock_on_client.cameraSwapSmoothnes: Applies easing to manual shoulder swaps when camera mode is Static.
focus.lock_on_client.dynamicCameraSwapSp: How quickly dynamic mode transitions between shoulders.
focus.lock_on_client.dynamicCameraSwapSm: Applies easing to dynamic shoulder transitions for softer swaps.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapMouseDead: Ignore tiny mouse motion below this amount while locked on.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapMouseActi: Mouse movement required before directional target swap can trigger.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapDirection: How closely candidate direction must match mouse direction.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapMinScreen: Minimum on-screen spacing from current target to allow a swap.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapInputDeca: How quickly stored mouse input fades when swap does not trigger.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapSmoothTic: How long post-swap aim smoothing stays active.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapLookYawRe: Yaw aim responsiveness during post-swap smoothing.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapLookPitch: Pitch aim responsiveness during post-swap smoothing.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapLookMaxYa: Maximum yaw rotation step per tick during post-swap smoothing.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapLookMaxPi: Maximum pitch rotation step per tick during post-swap smoothing.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapTargetPoi: How quickly target-point smoothing adapts right after a swap.
focus.lock_on_client.targetSwapPlayerLoo: How strongly player yaw/pitch follows lock-on aim at swap start. Lower values reduce snap.
focus.lock_on_client.enableTargetFilters: Apply target filters to lock-on and directional target swap. Disabled by default.
focus.lock_on_client.targetFilterMode.de: Exclude filters out matching targets. Exclusive only allows matching targets.
Matching targets are ignored by lock-on.
Only matching targets can be locked on.
focus.lock_on_client.filterPlayers.desc: Include players in target filtering rules.
focus.lock_on_client.filterPassiveMobs.d: Include passive mobs in target filtering rules.
focus.lock_on_client.filterNeutralMobs.d: Include neutral mobs in target filtering rules.
focus.lock_on_client.filterHostileMobs.d: Include hostile mobs in target filtering rules.
focus.lock_on_client.targetFilterEntityI: Entity IDs to match in target filtering (example: minecraft:zombie).
focus.lock_on_client.cameraRotation.desc: Third-person lock-on camera yaw rotation around the player.
Horizontal offset for the right-shoulder lock-on camera.
Vertical offset for the right-shoulder lock-on camera.
Backward distance for the right-shoulder lock-on camera.
focus.lock_on_client.rightCameraRotation: Yaw rotation for the right-shoulder lock-on camera.
focus.lock_on_client.openCameraPositionE: Open a live preview editor for lock-on third-person camera offsets and rotation.
screen.focus.camera_editor.title: Lock-On Camera Position Editor
screen.focus.camera_editor.preview_hint: Live preview is active while this screen is open.
screen.focus.camera_editor.preview_hint_: Press H to show camera editor controls.
screen.focus.camera_editor.preset_import: Clipboard does not contain a valid camera setup.
screen.focus.camera_editor.custom_swap_v: Swapped shoulder now mirrors edited values.
screen.focus.multiplayer_warning.title: Multiplayer Warning
screen.focus.multiplayer_warning.line1: Using Focus on servers without authorization may result in a ban.
screen.focus.multiplayer_warning.line2: Consult server admins before using this mod in multiplayer.
screen.focus.multiplayer_warning.line3: Please acknowledge this warning before continuing.
